title: Big Globe - Stalwart Dungeons Compatibility
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-stalwart-dungeons-compatibility)

Needs [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), A compatibility mod/datapack for [Stalwart Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/stalwart-dungeons), makes all structures generate correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)
